  false)

reasoning: 35ae2e259e4.c L17: '*eckey = 15;' in the else-else branch (when !SSL_CTX_set_ecdh_auto). Pulse detects eckey as read without initialization — same desugaring-based uninitialized path as TRANSFORMATION_85/121. The PC includes HAVE_ECC=T and !SSL_CTX_set_ecdh_auto=T (real feature flags for this path) plus !_STDLIB_H (restrictive) and !__need_malloc_and_calloc (non-restrictive). The restrictive !_STDLIB_H over-constrains the PC. New bug, over-constrained PC.
